data.title: Pool Corporation Reports Q3 Earnings: Key Takeaways
data.description: Pool Corporation (NASDAQ: POOL) shares are trading higher Thursday after the company reported financial results for the third quarter of 2024. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Virtu Financial Q3: Earnings Beat, Revenue Surge, Dividend Payout & More
data.description: Virtu Financial beat Q3 earnings expectations with an adjusted EPS of 82 cents, declared a 24-cent dividend, and saw trading income rise 40.5%.
